narrative:
Union Township E (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,720 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
